\tzpentry{ID3430}{Density Divergence Field Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3430 introduces Density Divergence Field Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$\rho \ddot{u} = (\lambda + \mu) \nabla(\nabla \cdot u) + \mu \nabla^2 u + f_{EM} + f_{fold}$$
